CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT listagg(value, ', ') FROM test_table WHERE id < 5;
CREATE TABLE another_table (group_id INT, group_value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT group_id, listagg(group_value, ' | ') FROM another_table GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT listagg(value, '|') FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value) AS sorted_values;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (cat_id INT, item_name VARCHAR(100));
SELECT cat_id, listagg(item_name, ', ') FROM complex_table GROUP BY cat_id ORDER BY cat_id;
SELECT listagg(value, '-') FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL));
SELECT listagg(value, ' << ') FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS distinct_values;
SELECT listagg(value, ', ') FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id > 2);
CREATE TABLE joined_table (join_id INT, test_id INT);
SELECT jt.join_id, listagg(tt.value, '; ') FROM joined_table jt JOIN test_table tt ON jt.test_id = tt.id GROUP BY jt.join_id;
